title: Cursed fate: Modulo Yuji Addon
description: An addon for the Cursed Fate mod that adds Yuji Itadori’s abilities from Modulo, bringing new techniques and combat mechanics to Minecraft.
body:
# Abilities:

 
### **Ability 1: Black Flash Strike**
A Black Flash punch that applies negative effects to the enemy while giving the user some positive buffs.

**Flow** – Increases the damage and duration of the effects.

**Maximum Output** – Turns the attack into one very strong Black Flash punch that launches                                                                                            
                       the enemy very far away.




### **Ability 2: Dismantle**
Releases a large dismantle slash that can destroy blocks and deal high damage.

**Flow** – Increases the damage.

**Maximum Output** – After a short animation, a huge dismantle slash is fired forward,  
                       causing massive destruction and damage.




### **Ability 3: Cleave**
(while holding) Creates multiple small slashes around the user that reduce incoming damage. If enemies get very close, they will start taking damage from the slashes.

**Flow** – Increases the damage and the range of the close damage.

**Maximum Output** – Releases a large slash around the user that deals big damage and leaves  
                       a checkerboard style destruction pattern.




### **Ability 4: Rushdown Beatdown**
Teleports the user to the last enemy they hit and performs a Black Flash attack that gives buffs to the user and negative effects to the enemy.

**Flow** – Increases damage and effect duration.

**Maximum Output** – Turns the move into a counter with a 1 second window but with a  
                       relatively small cooldown.




### **Ability 5: Piercing Blood**
(after holding) Shoots multiple piercing blood attacks at enemies which apply several negative and disorienting effects.

**Flow** – Increases the damage.

**Maximum Output** – After charging for a short duration(10s), Piercing Blood is replaced with             
                       Fuga, creating a large explosion with massive destruction and damage.




### **Ability 6: It Doesn't Matter**
Turns all abilities into their Maximum Output variants.

# Commands
/gamerule moduloYujiDestroyBlocks false   - turn off destruction  


/cursedfate SetTechnique TheStrongestOfAllTimes <your name>   - gives you modulo yuji technique
‎

‎

### Note‎ ‎ 
✞ "You have made us for yourself, O Lord, and our heart is restless until it rests in you" - Saint Augustine of Hippo
